title: Muertos de amor
overview: Ángel Peláez is a very jealous man. Since losing his arm in an accident, and therefore alsohis job as a waiter at the Hotel Ritz, spends the day imagining Reme, his wife betrays him with most men who cross her life. The butcher, the bookseller who advised her romantic novels, the dealer of butane or gynecologist ... all are potential lovers hurt Angel's tortured imagination.
